title: Everything You Want
why_this_song: Everything You Want by Vertical Horizon (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "He's everything you want, he's everything you need"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "He's everything you want, he's everything you need"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "He says all the right things at exactly the right time"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Now you're here and you don't know why"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Now you're here and you don't know why"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everything" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everything" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "he's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "he's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Somewhere, there's speaking, it's already coming in
You're waiting for someone to put you together
It's only what you're waiting for

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Everything You Want" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Everything You Want" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Everything You Want", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Everything You Want", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Everything You Want" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Everything You Want" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
